Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.wait_stats_id AS %1, r.plan_id AS %2, r.runtime_stats_interval_id AS %3, r.wait_category AS %4, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.wait_category_desc) AS %5, r.execution_type AS %6, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.execution_type_desc) AS %7, r.total_query_wait_time_ms AS %8, r.avg_query_wait_time_ms AS %9, r.last_query_wait_time_ms AS %10, r.min_query_wait_time_ms AS %11, r.max_query_wait_time_ms AS %12, r.stdev_query_wait_time_ms AS %13, r.replica_group_id AS %14, 1010 AS %15 FROM sys.query_store_wait_stats r", asWaitStatsId, asPlanId, asRuntimeStatsIntervalId, asWaitCategory, asWaitCategoryDesc, asExecutionType, asExecutionTypeDesc, asTotalQueryWaitTimeMs, asAvgQueryWaitTimeMs, asLastQueryWaitTimeMs, asMinQueryWaitTimeMs, asMaxQueryWaitTimeMs, asStdevQueryWaitTimeMs, asReplicaGroupId, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: initialize
construct
